title: Thursday, May 28, 2026
description: Tel Aviv weather, yesterday's market close, and a thought to start your day.
spoken_text: Good morning, Sagee. It's Thursday, May 28, 2026. In Tel Aviv right now, currently 25 degrees Celsius and mostly sunny. Today's high near 26, low 20. No rain expected. Turning to markets — at yesterday's close, the S and P 500 finished at 7,520, up about 2.3 percent. The Nasdaq 100 closed at 29,974, up about 4 percent. The VIX is at 16.7, in calm territory, and CNN's Fear and Greed Index reads 50 — neutral. Today's thought is from Audre Lorde: Caring for myself is not self-indulgence, it is self-preservation. Have a wonderful Thursday.
